previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung righthanded on the bend turning in.
Jumped awkwardly from the stalls and slowly into stride as a result.

form.formComment: Returns from a 51-day let-up. At the latest run held ground to the line 3rd of 9 at this track on February 17 over 1000m, 1.75 len behind Second Collection with 58.5kg at $6.50. form.formComment: Filly back from a spell of 12 weeks. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign fifth of 7 at Lingfield All Weather January 14 over 1000m, 4.5 len behind Forest Gunner carrying 61kg at $4.30. First up last campaign third in a small field at Catterick May 24 over 1000m, 8 len behind Reservardo carrying 58kg at $13. Draws okay and should be thereabouts.
